reviews.text:
Sadly I have experienced very poor handling of appointment and during appointment and even after appointment. I was meant to have three appointments back to back and the person organising these over the phone was super helpful.
Once I arrived at the clinic late morning around 11:30 I have been told that one of the doctors did not come in. I asked why they could not contact me in the morning? They had no answer. Out of three appointments I ended up with one only and the person showing me to the room not only stayed in the room but did not close the curtains. I had to ask and then the doctor asked her again as well. It was very uncomfortable.
After the appointment I never received a letter from the doctor with my diagnosis. I only have the HCA invoice. Trying to call them without any results for 35min- nobody picking up the phone.
I feel like they were very efficient in taking my money but badly organised unfriendly and inefficient and untidy with all the rest

Doctors use this place as another hub to see patients. It is also very convenient in terms of location..This could have been a hidden gem - as there is no other similar size clinic around...

I am always happy with the doctors' service but not with the other personnel..Especially it is quite a challenge to get some information from the nurses or to make a booking with the other personnel. I couldn't even figure out a protocol to take my diagnostic tests!! Or, I missed the deadline of a test because of lack of information...and I had to attend again..also, I tried to reach the units few times in two different days by phone but could not reach..

They work like a GP instead of a private clinic..

Try to use the other HCA clinics...
Reception are quite rude. Doctors were absolutely lovely and very thorough. However beware of evil receptionists. Openly gossiping about other patients

I would leave zero stars if it was possible. It took me a month to get an appointment for a blood test. Nobody answers the phone here. Eventually got through to an idiotic, grumpy person. On the appointment day itself -very slow and …
Impossible to reach - no one ever picks up the phone. Still waiting for the results of a test a week after… so unprofessional

Waste of time due to their extremely poor administration team. I have wasted weeks trying to get some tests arranged for my daughter that were confirmed by the doctor purely because the admin team is unable or unwilling to help, hardly ever pick up the phone or respond to emails. Even after trying to contact the management through their website to put a formal complaint I have not heard anything back. Avoid if you can.

In line with other reviews, 30 mins on hold ( and still waiting..) to try and book an appointment. Really trying to avoid central London when I can do this locally in Chiswick but this is rather painful...
I got seen quicker in an NHS hospital...

This place is a mess! I only come here for doctor appointments, never use them for any tests! The nurse did not follow correct procedures during advanced bloods works. After realising an error was made, nurse did not speak to my doctor or her supervisor. Instead, she acted through her own free will (against all training and regulations), resulting in my doctor making a complaint with the medical director. I then had to come back on another day to repeat the 2.5hr blood tests after fasting yet again.

The fact that I was made to wait in the main waiting room between tests with a canula in my arm also shows little regard to health and safety (Covid). My doctor was mortified when informed of what had happened on the day. Never coming back here for tests again. New building but that's all they have going for them. Much better of using Wellington Platinum Medical Centre, never had an issue there.
Fast to take your money, slow to respond or follow up despite I was suggested a urgent scan

No idea how this place has a high rating.  My wife and I have both been there once with terrible results.  I went in with a severe chest cough and sore throat.  After sitting in the waiting room for 30 min, an apologetic doctor came out and …
Can't seem to get an appt. Waiting for a call back since Thurs. I have escalated today only to be put on hold.
Can't get through to anyone.. terrible service.

Lost my chest X-ray, in fact, lost data about me.
Came early, doctor said "I only have 6 minutes"
DIdn't even do anything!

At the X-ray, some woman shouting at my partner that he doesn't know whether I'm registered, instead of asking the reception that's 10 meters away.

Unprofessional, ridiculous behaviour, no organisation.

AVOID AT ALL COST
No one answers the phone after 10 minutes hanging on. I am not impressed

£850 for a wrist MRI!!
Got it done for £200.
Only saved £650!!

I had to see a doctor which was great but the overall experience was not the best. The staff making the booking for appointments there are not considering people personal situations. I spent in total 8 hours of my day (including travel and waiting) to have 5 minutes consultation that could be done online. Instead of offerring me that option I have been given information on how much penalty I will pay if I do not turn up for the appointment. I will not use that clinic anymore, which is a pity as they have a good doctors.

The care is fine but the pricing is outrageous! Only visit this facility if you have gold standard healthcare insurance. My BUPA policy covers consultation here but no scans which can catch you out very expensively. I was charged £528 for a …

Your website to book appointments is abysmal.
It then took me over 2 hours with 3 agents to book an appointment.
I had gynae appt and he recommended ultrasound. Trying to book an ultrasound appt is horrendous. It’s been over 36 hours and still no appt. Your call centre today was supposed to call me to confirm if I got appt or not. Nobody called. I used your services and medical centre in April 2024.. that was fine. Something has changed and this time it’s horrendous. I’m appalled.
They do not respect appointment times. Prepare yourself to wait for 2+ hours.

Not impressed. Promised to send results of my  ultra scan to my GP by the next day. Did not arrive. I tel. to ask. They left me on hold and  then closed  the telephone line down  for the evening. Will not use again.

There has not been a single time where I saw my doctor on time. I also had a CAT scan where I also had to wait Almost am hour to get seen. This isn't one incident but every time over 2 years and many appointments the minimum I had to wait for is 30 minutes. This way you just waste patients time who take time off work to come see their doctor. Please do not schedule appointments if you are unable to get seen on time.

i am trying to become a patient at CMC.  The phone message is off-putting and the faulty phone system is frustration. It does not encourage me as I will get this service when I ring to make an appointment. I will continue to try getting …
Been on hold over the phone for the last 25min! They don't even have a switchboard! How annoying

Facilities are good.
But main reason for which patients come and get tested for their problems, should be properly diagnosed. My wife had MRI scan, and we didn’t get MRI scans and only got one page report letter full of medical terms which is not understandable to non-medical person and message that everything is Normal. Patient should be convinced that they are Normal by making them understand results.
